series_metadata.series_title: Children's Trust Fund Early Childhood Safety Initiative
series_metadata.series_description: Early Childhood Safety Initiative Files include requests for proposals, Temporary Assistance for Needy Families (TANF) self attestation and eligibility forms, copies of request for applications, grant applications, grant agreements, assessments and scoring tools, award letters, progress reports, documents pertaining to all grant activities, and related e-mail correspondence.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: in office and 5 year in records center ; Paper: in office and 5 year in records center
